notes:
Following other people's reports, here's how I got this game working on Ubuntu, terminal commands are in quotes:
1. 'sudo apt install winetricks'.
2. 'wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sirmentio/protontricks/master/protontricks && chmod +x protontricks'.
3. 'sudo mv protontricks /usr/bin/protontricks'.
4. cd to game folder, usually under .steam/steam/steamapps/common/Combat\ Wings\ Battle\ of\ Britain.
5. 'protontricks 34820 corefonts'.

Game was perfectly fine after this, originally it was giving a missing font error. Only issue after these fixes is that the intro screen is black but that is the only error I found.
title: Combat Wings: Battle of Britain

cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Worked for me WITHOUT installing winetricks & corefonts on my latest Ubuntu build (you have to 'run' the game once for it to create the folders/environment, before winetricks/protontricks can install the fonts). I only did that after the fact - made no difference. Also, only running the 64-bit version of wineprefix now (see terminal info about 32-bit verbs).
title: Combat Wings: Battle of Britain

notes: The intro video is a black screen, but if you click past it the rest of the game seems to work fine without any tweaking required.
title: Combat Wings: Battle of Britain
